wikitext:
{{Character Infobox|Regent2}} {{Summon Infobox|Sovereign Blade}} The {{StS2|Regent}} is the third of the five characters in [[Slay the Spire 2 Wiki|Slay the Spire 2]]. His Majesty is unlocked after completing a run with the {{KW|Silent||2}}. His Majesty starts with 75 Max HP. At {{Asc|2|Ascension|2}} and above his Majesty starts with 60 HP. == Starting Loadout == === Starting Relic === {{R|Divine Right||2}} - At the start of each combat, gain {{Icon|ST|2}}{{Icon|ST|2}}{{Icon|ST|2}}. Can be replaced by {{R|Divine Destiny||2}}. === Starting Deck === These {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent&rarity:Basic|Cards|2}} cannot be obtained through regular card rewards. * {{C|Strike (Regent)|Strike|2}} x4 * {{C|Defend (Regent)|Defend|2}} x4 * {{C|Falling Star||2}} x1 * {{C|Venerate||2}} x1 === Regent Cards === There are a total of 82 regular cards in Regent's card pool. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Regent_Skill_Common.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent&rarity:Common|Common Cards|2}} x20 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Regent_Skill_Uncommon.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent&rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon Cards|2}} x36 * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Regent_Skill_Rare.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent&rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} x26 When playing {{2|Multiplayer}}, these cards get added to the card pool: * {{C|Largesse||2}} * {{C|Hammer Time||2}} There are also two cards that are not obtainable through normal means. * [[File:StS2_CardIcon_Regent_Skill_Ancient.png|24px]] {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent&rarity:Ancient|Ancient Cards|2}} x2
A full list of Regent Cards (and more) can be found {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Regent|here|2}}. == Unique Relics == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Relic |- |'''Common''' |{{R|Fencing Manual||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{R|Galactic Dust||2}}, {{R|Regalite||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{R|Lunar Pastry||2}}, {{R|Mini Regent||2}}, {{R|Orange Dough||2}} |- |'''Shop''' |{{R|Vitruvian Minion||2}} |} == Unique Potions == {| class="wikitable" |+ !Rarity !Potion |- |'''Common''' |{{P|Star Potion||2}} |- |'''Uncommon''' |{{P|King's Courage||2}} |- |'''Rare''' |{{P|Cosmic Concoction||2}} |} == Unlocks == The Regent is unlocked by completing a run with the {{KW|Silent||2}}. This does not have to be a win. Like all characters, there are 6 Epochs in the [[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline|Timeline]] which are discovered upon reaching certain Regent gameplay milestones, unlocking Cards, Relics, and Potions unique to the Regent. {| class="wikitable" |+ ![[Slay the Spire 2:Timeline#The Regent|Epoch]]
(Unlock Requirement) !Rewards |- |{{2|Timeline#I Arrive|I Arrive}}
(Beating Act 1) |{{C|Spoils of Battle||2}}, {{C|Furnace||2}}, {{C|Sword Sage||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#We Need a Hero!|We Need a Hero!}}
(Beating Act 2) |{{R|Fencing Manual||2}}, {{R|Galactic Dust||2}}, {{R|Lunar Pastry||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Grand Strategy|Grand Strategy}}
(Beating Act 3) |{{P|Star Potion||2}}, {{P|King's Courage||2}}, {{P|Cosmic Concoction||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Little King|Little King}}
(Beating {{Asc|1|Ascension|2}}) |{{C|Patter||2}}, {{C|Lunar Blast||2}}, {{C|Heavenly Drill||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Friends|Friends}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Elites|Elites]]) |{{C|BEGONE!||2}}, {{C|Supermassive||2}}, {{C|Arsenal||2}} |- |{{2|Timeline#Discontent|Discontent}}
(Killing 15 [[Slay the Spire 2:Bosses|Bosses]]) |{{R|Regalite||2}}, {{R|Mini Regent||2}}, {{R|Orange Dough||2}} |} Additionally, completing a single run with the Regent, even if the run ends with a loss, will unlock the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}} as a playable character. ==Trivia== *The Regent's pronouns are listed internally in the source code as follows: ** Subject Pronoun: his Majesty ** Object Pronoun: him ** Adjective/Possessive pronoun: his Majesty's * Hovering over the constellations on Regent's character selection screen shows an outline of what each constellation represents. Clockwise from top left, the constellations are: ** A polygonal monster, possibly [[Donu and Deca#Deca|Deca]] ** A [[Spheric Guardian]] ** A [[Cultist|Cultist's]] mask ** An [[Exploder]] ** A [[Snecko]] ** A [[Sentry]] *** Note that some constellations are not visible in most aspect ratios. Changing the aspect ratio to 21:9 makes them all visible. [[Category:Character]][[Category:Slay_the_Spire_2_Content]]
